description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of sandals from enroute. Pair it with any kind of ethnic or western wear and look great both ways.This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.Heel: 2"UpperLeather upper with a peep toe and a leather patch crunching the forefoot strap like a bow Slip on style for ease of wearLeather footbed for all day comfortOutsoleDurable PU outsole with creeper-styled grooved and a horizontally grooved heel patch in rubber for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe the leather surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
